text.title: uv-lockfile-floor Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for uv-lockfile-floor as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The lock is hash-verified; a hand edit either fails the next sync or — worse — installs an unsigned set. Use `uv lock --upgrade-package <name>` or adjust constraints in pyproject.toml and re-lock.

failure-mode.description: Mixing `pip install` calls inside a uv-managed project.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: pip writes to the same venv but does not touch uv.lock. The next `uv sync` removes the package and breaks the build. Pick one tool per project.
